notes: Frozen pretrained Uni-Mol (unimolv1, 84m) via unimol_tools 0.1.6 UniMolRepr.get_repr(return_atomic_reprs=False), cls_repr per molecule. 3D conformers generated internally by RDKit ETKDG (remove_hs=False). Computed on CPU. Rows aligned to drugs_ordered.csv drug_idx order. Fallback zero vectors for drug_idx: [].
